title: Andrés Zamberk - Foster Global
content:
Andrés Zamberk is a partner at Foster LLP in our Houston office. He focuses his practice on business immigration matters, representing industry leading multinational corporate clients in the energy, engineering, infrastructure and information technology industries. He provides strategic counsel on employment-based temporary and permanent visa categories, family-based permanent residence and naturalization.
Recognized as a Best Lawyer in America, and Lawdragon, Andrés has more than 20 years of business immigration experience. He received his LL.M. degree from the Washington College of Law at American University in Washington, D.C., and received his Licenciatura en Derecho (J.D. equivalent) from Universidad de Málaga in Spain.
Prior to joining the firm, Andrés practiced U.S. immigration law at a business immigration boutique in the D.C. Metro area, and worked at a Big Four accounting firm in Toronto, Canada.
Andrés is licensed to practice in the State of New York, and is an active member of the American Immigration Lawyers Association (AILA).
Why Did You Decide To Become An Immigration Attorney?
Having lived in five different countries and gone through the immigration process myself, I developed an interest in immigration law after researching my own situation at the time. I can relate to my clients and enjoy helping them navigate the intricacies of immigration. – Andrés Zamberk
- February, 2022 – Presented on “To (H-1)B or Not to (H-1)B – Preparing for the H-1B Cap Season” in a Foster webinar.
- Best Lawyers in America (2021)
